question: what is the total revenue from all orders
golden_sql: SELECT SUM(TotalAmount) AS total_revenue FROM Order_

question: top 5 brands by total revenue
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: average order value by product category
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, AVG(o.TotalAmount) AS avg_order_value FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

question: revenue by customer segment
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Segment, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY cu.Segment ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: top 5 US states by total revenue
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Province AS state, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY cu.Province ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: monthly revenue trend in 2025
golden_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS month, SUM(TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ WHERE OrderDate >= '2025-01-01' AND OrderDate < '2026-01-01' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: revenue by payment method
golden_sql: SELECT oe.PaymentMethod, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId GROUP BY oe.PaymentMethod ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: total revenue by brand
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS total_revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

question: count orders by order status
golden_sql: SELECT Status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM Order_ GROUP BY Status ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: what percentage of orders were cancelled
golden_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Status = 'Cancelled' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS cancelled_pct FROM Order_

question: count orders by shipping method
golden_sql: SELECT ShippingMethod, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM OrderExtra GROUP BY ShippingMethod ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: returned orders breakdown by category
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId WHERE o.Status = 'Returned' GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: how many high priority orders are there
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM Order_ WHERE Priority = 'High'

question: orders placed on weekends versus weekdays
golden_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN IsWeekend = 1 THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END AS day_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM Order_ GROUP BY IsWeekend

question: average customer loyalty score by segment
golden_sql: SELECT Segment, AVG(LoyaltyScore) AS avg_loyalty FROM Customer GROUP BY Segment ORDER BY avg_loyalty DESC

question: top 5 states by number of orders
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Province AS state, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY cu.Province ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

question: total spend from VIP customers
golden_sql: SELECT SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS total_spend FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE cu.Segment = 'VIP'

question: average age of customers by segment
golden_sql: SELECT Segment, AVG(Age) AS avg_age FROM Customer GROUP BY Segment ORDER BY avg_age DESC

question: top 5 customers by total spend
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Name, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS total_spend FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY cu.CustomerId ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5

question: order count per customer segment
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Segment, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY cu.Segment ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: top 5 brands by quantity sold
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, SUM(oi.Quantity) AS total_qty FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

question: average product rating by category
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, AVG(r.Rating) AS avg_rating FROM Review r JOIN Product p ON r.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

question: most popular sub-category by quantity sold
golden_sql: SELECT sc.Name AS sub_category, SUM(oi.Quantity) AS total_qty FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId WHERE sc.ParentCategoryId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sc.Name ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

question: average product price by brand
golden_sql: SELECT Brand, AVG(Price) AS avg_price FROM Product GROUP BY Brand ORDER BY avg_price DESC

question: total revenue by product category
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: which brand has the highest average customer rating
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, AVG(r.Rating) AS avg_rating FROM Review r JOIN Product p ON r.ProductId = p.ProductId GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 1

question: on-time delivery rate by shipping method
golden_sql: SELECT ShippingMethod, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN DeliveryStatus = 'On Time' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS on_time_rate FROM OrderExtra GROUP BY ShippingMethod ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC

question: average delivery days by shipping method
golden_sql: SELECT ShippingMethod, AVG(DeliveryDays) AS avg_days FROM OrderExtra GROUP BY ShippingMethod ORDER BY avg_days ASC

question: lost shipments count by warehouse location
golden_sql: SELECT WarehouseLocation, COUNT(*) AS lost_cnt FROM OrderExtra WHERE DeliveryStatus = 'Lost' GROUP BY WarehouseLocation ORDER BY lost_cnt DESC

question: delayed orders count by state
golden_sql: SELECT o.ShippingProvince AS state, COUNT(*) AS delayed_cnt FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId WHERE oe.DeliveryStatus = 'Delayed' GROUP BY o.ShippingProvince ORDER BY delayed_cnt DESC

question: total revenue by warehouse location
golden_sql: SELECT oe.WarehouseLocation, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId GROUP BY oe.WarehouseLocation ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: average shipping cost by shipping method
golden_sql: SELECT ShippingMethod, AVG(ShippingCostUSD) AS avg_shipping_cost FROM OrderExtra GROUP BY ShippingMethod ORDER BY avg_shipping_cost DESC

question: order breakdown by device type
golden_sql: SELECT DeviceType, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM OrderExtra GROUP BY DeviceType ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: what percentage of orders used a coupon
golden_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CouponUsed) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS coupon_pct FROM OrderExtra

question: average delivery days by device type
golden_sql: SELECT DeviceType, AVG(DeliveryDays) AS avg_delivery_days FROM OrderExtra GROUP BY DeviceType ORDER BY avg_delivery_days ASC

question: top campaign source by total revenue
golden_sql: SELECT oe.CampaignSource, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId GROUP BY oe.CampaignSource ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1

question: average fraud risk score by payment method
golden_sql: SELECT PaymentMethod, AVG(FraudRiskScore) AS avg_risk FROM OrderExtra GROUP BY PaymentMethod ORDER BY avg_risk DESC

question: how many orders have a fraud risk score above 0.5
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS high_risk_cnt FROM OrderExtra WHERE FraudRiskScore > 0.5

question: coupon usage rate by order status
golden_sql: SELECT o.Status, ROUND(SUM(oe.CouponUsed) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS coupon_rate FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId GROUP BY o.Status ORDER BY coupon_rate DESC

question: total revenue from California orders
golden_sql: SELECT SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS total_revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE cu.Province = 'California'
